name: Radiobutton
description: Mutually exclusive single-selection control within a group. Supports label, description, and text orientation. Uses a native radio input with a visual circle and inner dot.

props.name: textOrientation
props.description: Position of the text relative to the radio

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class for the root element

states.rationale: Both selected and unselected states use overlay tokens for hover/pressed. The circle is always a non-filled surface (surface-base or overlay).

keyboard.Arrow Up/Down: Moves focus and selection within a radio group
keyboard.Arrow Left/Right: Moves focus and selection within a radio group
keyboard.Tab: Moves focus to/from the radio group

accessibility.focusManagement: native radio input focus; external focus ring via box-shadow on :focus-visible

propertyMapping.note: Figma-only visual state (normal/hover/focus/disable). In code, CSS pseudo-classes and disabled prop. Note: Figma uses 'disable' not 'disabled'.

useWhen: Mutually exclusive single-selection within a group
Settings where only one option can be active
Form fields requiring exactly one choice
doNotUseFor: Binary on/off toggle — use Checkbox or Switcher
Navigation or filtering — use Tabs or Dropdown

knownDeviations.description: No L4 color tokens in tokens.json. Uses L2 semantic tokens directly. Only --dls-radius-component-radiobutton exists as L4.
Figma component (59:7022) shows only the radio circle. In code, Radiobutton includes label and description text. The full form control with label is composed at usage level in Figma.
Figma uses 'disable' (no d) instead of 'disabled' for the disabled state value.
